results.title: Google Ads Updates Its Campaign Status Interface
results.description: Google is rolling out a new look and feel for the Google Ads campaign status notifications and icons. The new statuses are no longer highlighted fully, instead they are just outlined in various colors. It makes it a bit less extreme to look at, and I am not sure if that is a good or bad change.

results.title: Indian Railways Approves ₹1,037 Crore for Three Major Projects Across Madhya Pradesh, Eastern Railway and Gujarat
results.description: Indian Railways has approved three major projects worth ₹1,037 crore, including the reconstruction of Indore's Shastri ROB, a ₹405 crore signalling modernization project on Eastern Railway, and the ₹493 crore Adipur-Bhuj doubling project in Gujarat.

results.title: TODAY IN HISTORY
Punjab Govt delivers 437 government services at citizens' doorsteps
results.description: The Punjab government has made 437 services available through its doorstep delivery platform. Citizens can access these services by calling the 1076 helpline, booking appointments through WhatsApp, using the online portal or visiting Sewa Kendras.

results.title: Poll: Americans wary of data center boom
results.description: WASHINGTON — Just one in three Americans approve of the fast pace of data-center construction that supports artificial intelligence and most would oppose building one in their own community, according to a new Reuters/Ipsos poll.
